# mailgun_ip_allowlist (Resource)

Manages a Mailgun IP allowlist entry. IP allowlisting restricts API key and SMTP credential usage to specific IP addresses.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `address` (String) The IP address or CIDR range to allowlist (e.g., '192.168.1.1' or '192.168.1.0/24').

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description for this IP allowlist entry.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the IP allowlist entry (same as the address).
